violations.text: Various foods were observed held at 43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was relocated to other refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The open air cooler was observed at an ambient of 43 degrees. Unit must be adjusted to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees. All food in unit was observed at 43-44 degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The floors in the back storage area has an accumulation of miscellaneous food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
